description: CyberArk provides identity security and privileged access products for managing identities, secrets, and secure access across cloud and hybrid environments. Its documentation spans SaaS platform services such as access management, secrets management, secure infrastructure access, and secure AI agent controls.
summary: CyberArk exposes a tenant-scoped Idira platform API catalog (mostly REST plus one documented GraphQL endpoint) authenticated with bearer tokens minted from an Identity service account, and it also documents a downloadable Secrets Manager MCP server without a public connect URL.
